hero.title: Official contact.
hero.subtitle: Contact ITICs to resolve questions about admissions, academic formation, community, projects, and program activities.

values.location: Paseo del Agrarismo 2000. Carr. Mixquiahuala-Tula, km 2.5, C.P. 42700.

guidance.note: For quick questions, use WhatsApp. For formal information or academic follow-up, use the institutional email.

routing.title: Where should I write?
routing.subtitle: Choose the right channel or section based on the type of information you need.

admission.title: Admissions and application
admission.body: Check requirements, dates, registration, and admission process for the 2026–2027 cycle.

career.title: Program information
career.body: Resolve questions about curriculum, training areas, graduate profile, and academic activities.

projects.title: Projects and community
projects.body: Explore clubs, repositories, projects, activities, and collaboration spaces in ITICs.

social.title: Official networks.
social.subtitle: Follow official ITICs channels for updates, projects, activities, events, and community content.

cta.title: Thinking about studying ITICs?
cta.subtitle: Review admissions, check requirements, and solve your questions through official channels.
